signals.headline: Ripple Partners with Kyobo Life Insurance (Apr 16 Announcement)** | YES | HIGH
signals.raw:
Ripple Partners with Kyobo Life Insurance (Apr 16 Announcement)** | YES | HIGH  
Ripple announced a partnership with South Korea's Kyobo Life Insurance to tokenize government bond settlements using XRP, boosting XRP price 4.4% to $1.40 and flipping retail sentiment to bullish.[5]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M (Week Ending Apr 16)** | YES | HIGH  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs saw their largest single-week inflows in three months at $41.64 million, a 254% jump from the prior week, driving a 12.5% price surge from April lows amid bullish technical patterns like a forming cup-and-handle.[1]

signals.headline: Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts in Treasury (Recent)** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts in Treasury (Recent)** | YES | MED  
Ripple introduced Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury, embedding XRP and RLUSD balances into treasury management with real-time valuation, amid XRP trading at ~$1.31.[3]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Deadline Looms (Apr 27 Potential Vote)** | NO | LOW
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Deadline Looms (Apr 27 Potential Vote)** | NO | LOW  
Senate Banking Committee faces pressure from banks delaying CLARITY Act markup past April 27, creating uncertainty rather than resolution; no vote confirmed.[6]
